text.content:
◉ Auspex

Level 1: Heightened Senses

Cost: Free | Pool: Wits + Awareness (to detect specific hidden things) | Type: Passive

Sharpen one or all senses to supernatural levels. Hear whispered conversations through walls, read fine print at great distance, identify individuals by scent, taste blood resonance with precision. While active, loud noises, bright lights, or strong smells can overwhelm you — take a 2-dice penalty on all actions for 1 turn. Can be activated reflexively. Lasts one scene or until deactivated.

Level 1: Sense the Unseen

Cost: Free | Pool: Wits + Awareness or Resolve + Auspex | Type: Utility

Detect supernatural concealment: Obfuscate, spirit presence, hidden magic. Roll Wits + Auspex against the concealing power's rating. Success reveals the presence and general location of the hidden entity but not their identity. Works passively — the Storyteller may call for a roll when something hidden is nearby. Also detects mortals hiding by mundane means, though with less precision.

Level 2: Premonition

Cost: Free (involuntary) / 1 Rouse (deliberate) | Pool: Res + Auspex | Type: Utility

Receive involuntary flashes of insight — visions of the near future, warnings of ambushes, or glimpses of important events. The Storyteller may trigger these spontaneously. You can also deliberately meditate on a question (costs 1 Rouse) and receive a symbolic vision. Visions are never literal — they come as metaphors, sensory fragments, or emotional impressions. The Storyteller determines the clarity based on successes rolled.

Level 3: Scry the Soul

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Auspex vs Composure + Subterfuge | Type: Utility

Read the target's aura — a halo of shifting colors visible only to you. Reveals: emotional state (colors), supernatural nature (pale aura = vampire, bright = mage, etc.), Diablerie stains (black veins), recent feeding (red flush), and whether they are under a Blood Bond (red threads). Each success reveals one piece of information. The target does not know they are being read unless they have Auspex themselves. Range: line of sight.

Level 3: Share the Senses

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Auspex | Type: Utility

Tap into the senses of a person you have previously touched or whose blood you have tasted. You perceive everything they see, hear, and feel in real time. Your own senses are suppressed while sharing. The target is unaware unless they have Auspex 2+. Range: same city. Duration: one scene or until you voluntarily withdraw. Taking damage in your real body ends the effect.

Level 4: Spirit's Touch

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Auspex | Type: Utility

Touch an object to read psychic impressions left on it. Receive visions of the last person to handle it — their appearance, emotional state, and what they were doing. Successes determine clarity and how far back the impressions reach: 1 success = last few hours, 3 = last week, 5 = months. Strong emotional events (violence, passion, terror) leave the most vivid impressions. Useful for crime scene investigation.

Level 5: Clairvoyance

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Auspex | Type: Utility

Project your senses to any location you have previously visited or that contains a person whose blood you have tasted. You see and hear as if physically present but cannot interact. You are invisible and intangible at the remote location. Duration: number of minutes equal to successes rolled. A critical win allows you to also smell and feel at the location. Range: anywhere in the world.

Level 5: Possession

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: Res + Auspex vs Res + Int | Type: Combat

Amalgam: Dominate 3

Project your mind into a mortal's body, taking complete control. Your own body falls into a torpor-like state. You gain access to the mortal's physical Attributes and skills but use your own mental/social Attributes. The mortal's consciousness is suppressed — they experience the time as a blackout. If the mortal body takes lethal damage, you are ejected and your real body takes 1 Aggravated Willpower damage. Duration: one scene. Cannot possess supernatural beings.

Level 5: Telepathy

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Auspex vs Wits + Subterfuge | Type: Utility

Read surface thoughts of a target within line of sight. The target is unaware unless they have Auspex. Surface thoughts appear as a stream of impressions — whatever the target is currently thinking about. With 3+ successes, you can dig deeper for specific memories, but the target may feel mental intrusion (Wits + Awareness vs your successes to notice). You can also project thoughts into the target's mind, which they experience as their own internal voice. Cannot be used to command.
